---
title: "Georeferencia"
author: "JADM"
format: html
editor: visual
---

##bertelmann_h_2025_PECS

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "readxl", "readr", "data.table", "dplyr", "stringr", "ggplot2", "sf", "fs", "rnaturalearth", "rnaturalearthdata", "rio", "countrycode","maps", "stringi","rnaturalearthdata","devtools", "pack", "cli", "remotes", "countrycode","progress", "tidygeocoder", "dplyr", "readr", "purrr","ggplot")
# Install packages not yet installed [for the first time]
installed_packages <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())
if (any(installed_packages == FALSE)) {
install.packages(packages[!installed_packages])
}
library(readr)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#ImportarDatos

dfBR <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PECS.csv", sep = ",")
View(georeferencing_audit_summary)
View(dfBR)
names(dfBR) # check names of the columns
View(dfBR) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfBR) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

#FiltrarDatos
dfBR1 <- dfBR %>%
  filter(.ok_for_analysis == FALSE,
         !is.na(decimalLatitude),
         !is.na(decimalLongitude)) %>%
  select(
    occurrenceID,
    decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude,
    locality, country, countryCode,
    changes
  )
```


```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

#ClasificacionLocalidades 
dfBR <- dfBR %>%
  mutate(
    georef_class = case_when(
      is.na(locality) | stringr::str_squish(locality) == "" ~ "non_georef",
      stringr::str_detect(locality, regex(
        "\\d+\\s*km|carretera|road|highway|reserva|parque nacional|río|quebrada|cerro|vereda",
        ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "detailed",
      TRUE ~ "simple"
    )
  )

#CreacolumnasControl
if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfBR)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfBR)) {
    dfBR$ok.2 <- dfBR$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfBR$ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfBR)) dfBR$discardReason <- NA_character_
```


```{r}
#Locality
code <- dfBR$occurrenceID[1:21]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112390"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#Segundosubset

#Locality
code1 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[22:50]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code1)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112320"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#Tercersubset

code2 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[51:74]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code2)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112384"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#Cuartosubset

code3 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[75:87]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code3)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112423"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#QuintoSubset

code4 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[88:128]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code4)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112426"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}
```


```{r}
#ExportarDatos
write.csv(dfBR, file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PECS.csv", sep = ";")

write.table(x = dfBR, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PECS.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```


##bertelmann_h_2025_PERE

```{r}
dfBRh <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PERE.csv",sep = ",")
View(dfBRh)
names(dfBRh) # check names of the columns
View(dfBRh) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfBRh) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

dfBRh <- dfBRh %>%
  mutate(
    georef_class = case_when(
      is.na(locality) | stringr::str_squish(locality) == "" ~ "non_georef",
      stringr::str_detect(locality, regex(
        "\\d+\\s*km|carretera|road|highway|reserva|parque nacional|río|quebrada|cerro|vereda",
        ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "detailed",
      TRUE ~ "simple"
    )
  )

if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfBRh)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfBRh)) {
    dfBRh$ok.2 <- dfBRh$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfBRh$ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfBRh)) dfBRh$discardReason <- NA_character_

names(dfBRh)
head(dfBRh)
View(dfBRh)

```


```{r}
ids_a_modificar <- dfBRh$occurrenceID
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% ids_a_modificar)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
}
```

```{r}
dfBRh$ok.2 <- FALSE
VCode <- dfBRh$occurrenceID[1:21]
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% VCode)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112670"
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRh$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE 
}

#Segundosubset

#Locality
VCode1 <- dfBRh$occurrenceID[22:27]
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% VCode1)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112364"
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRh$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE 
}

#Tercersubset

VCode2 <- dfBRh$occurrenceID[28:38]
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% VCode2)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112372"
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRh$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE 
}

```

```{r}
write.table(x = dfBR, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PERE.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```
